headline: D-Wave CEO Warns Nvidia: Quantum Computers Are Coming For You
summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc. CEO Alan Baratz is turning up the heat on Nvidia Corp., arguing that quantum computing is poised to challenge the GPU giant's dominance in artificial intelligence. Speaking to Yahoo Finance at the Semafor World Economy Summit, Baratz said: "If I was Nvidia, I'd be shaking in my boots," framing quantum as the next wave of compute power that could eventually undercut traditional AI accelerators. headline: How NVIDIA Optics Deal and New AI Facility Will Impact Lumentum Holdings (LITE) Investors
summary: Lumentum Holdings recently announced multiyear agreements with NVIDIA, a very large US$2 billion investment in advanced optics, and plans for a new 240,000-square-foot Greensboro, North Carolina facility to produce indium phosphide-based optical devices for AI data centers. These moves highlight Lumentum’s push to become a core supplier to hyperscale AI infrastructure, with expanded domestic manufacturing aimed at supporting long-term demand from large cloud customers. headline: Is NVIDIA’s (NVDA) Open Quantum AI Push Quietly Redefining Its Core Infrastructure Moat?
summary: Earlier this week, NVIDIA unveiled NVIDIA Ising, the world’s first open-source quantum AI model family aimed at tackling quantum processor calibration and error correction, with early adoption across leading quantum hardware makers, universities, and research labs. By inserting its AI stack into the core control layer of emerging quantum systems, NVIDIA is positioning GPUs and CUDA-Q as foundational infrastructure for future hybrid quantum–classical supercomputers. We’ll now examine how...
